myactivities.title: Internship Activities at PT Telkom Semarang
myactivities.desc: Studying web development using React and NodeJs, as well as exploring the MongoDB database, was held from September 2, 2024 to February 20, 2025.

myactivities.title: PCC GTP (Goes To Public) activities
myactivities.desc: Participated in the web development training program at SMAN 9 Semarang and social service at the Manarul Mabrur Orphanage, acting as Public Relations Officer, which was carried out on March 13, 2026.

myactivities.title: RPL Expertise Competency Test Activities
myactivities.desc: The final practical exam to validate technical skills in the field of Software Engineering, was held on November 19-20, 2024

myactivities.title: PCC Regeneration Activities
myactivities.desc: The process of selecting the successor to the PCC admin through the e-voting website, acting as a member of the Sie Web, was carried out on April 12, 2026.
